name: Nova Aemilius
description:
Your bully is furious at you.

Or is she obsessed?

She targeted you when her ex Brock started showing interest in you, but is it because she hates you, or because she sees Brock as competition instead of the goal now?

bullied!user

x

bully!char

FemPOV

Unestablished Relationship

tw: bullying, repressed feelings, internalized h0m0ph0b!a, enemies to lovers

I had a lot of people ask for Nova after Brock, and I get it.

So, enjoy this from my private collection, because I want her, too. 👹

Also shes so Jade LeMac coded its not even funny. Definitely listen to the song below if you're able.

Got Me Obsessed - Jade LeMac

Bot not acting right/OOC?

JLLM issue, not a creator issue.

Things got NSFW too fast?

Also JLLM

Repeating itself? Speaking for you?

J L L M

♡♡♡♡♡

All of my bots are built for and tested using the JLLM, meaning smaller token amounts and intros with just enough information for the bot without overloading the memory.

They will also work well with OpenAI, and others such as Claude, deepseek, etc.

Please remember that the site is in beta, and so is the JLLM. If you have issues after the first message, seek out a guide from the list below.

↠absolutetrash's jailbreak↞

↠iorveths' JLLM for dummies↞

↠AvenRose's LLM guide↞
